final:
// // This module implements a 16-bit DRAM cell with read and write functionality. Data is written to the cell when we is low and read from the cell when we is high.
module dram_cell (
    input wire [15:0] data_in,
    input wire we,
    input wire clk,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            memory <= data_in; // Write operation
        end
        data_out <= memory; // Read operation
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 16-bit DRAM cell with read and write functionality. Data is written to the cell when we is low and read from the cell when we is high.
